subcodes.first_line: O Supreme Conqueror! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from this glorious station. Let nothing grieve thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فتح الاعظم یذکرک المظلوم فیهذا المقام الکریم ایاک ان یحزنک شیء ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @prayer for protection, @consolation and comfort
